text.title: Azure DevOps Boards Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to stand up a compliant ADO Boards configuration end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: pick-process-template
step.input: Governance constraints + compliance regime + team weight tolerance
step.action: Choose one of {Basic, Agile, Scrum, CMMI}. Document the decision with a one-paragraph rationale referencing the governance constraints.
step.decision-gate: If choice is "Custom" or forked, STOP and apply rule `template-inheritance`.

step.name: author-area-iteration-tree
step.action: Emit area_tree (team ownership) and iteration_tree (time-only) as YAML. Verify no name collisions across the two trees.
step.decision-gate: If any node name appears in both trees, STOP and apply rule `area-vs-iteration`.

step.name: configure-board
step.input: State machine of chosen template + team WIP tolerance
step.action: Define columns + state_mapping + wip_limit per column. Add swimlanes (Expedite, Default, Tech Debt). Add card-style red colouring for over-limit cards.
step.decision-gate: If any Active-state column has wip_limit null, FAIL and re-author.

step.name: wire-pat-and-ci
step.action: Issue PAT scoped to Work Items r/w. Store in 1Password / Azure Key Vault. Add CI rule rejecting PRs without AB#<id> reference.
step.decision-gate: If PAT has Full-access, ROTATE; the methodology refuses to register the artefact.

step.name: validate-and-register
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-azure-devops-boards.py --file ado-boards-config.yaml`. Commit to repo. Apply to ADO via `az boards` CLI or REST.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix violations before applying.
